group.explanation: Each word is a homophone of a word related to royalty/ceremony: PIECE→PEACE (as in peace treaty), KNEEL→NEIL, NIGHT→KNIGHT, WRAP→RAP. Corrected: PIECE/PEACE, KNEEL sounds like NEIL — not clean. Final clean version: homophones of words meaning to move downward: KNEEL (Neil — no).
